content.problemStatement:
You are given an array AAA of size NNN such that Ai=0A_i = 0Ai‚Äč=0 initially, for all 1‚Č§i‚Č§N1\le i \le N1‚Č§i‚Č§N.

You have MMM enemies and each enemy will blast one bomb on an index. The ithi^{th}ith enemy (1‚Č§i‚Č§M)(1\le i \le M)(1‚Č§i‚Č§M) will place their bomb at index XiX_iXi‚Äč, and the bomb will have a range of YiY_iYi‚Äč.

This means that, due to the ithi^{th}ith bomb, all indices in the range [Xi‚ąíYi,Xi+Yi][X_i-Y_i, X_i+Y_i][Xi‚Äč‚ąíYi‚Äč,Xi‚Äč+Yi‚Äč] might be affected:


For indices jjj, (max(1,Xi‚ąíYi)‚Č§j<Xi)(\texttt{max} (1, X_i - Y_i) \le j \lt X_i)(max(1,Xi‚Äč‚ąíYi‚Äč)‚Č§j<Xi‚Äč), the value at the jthj^{th}jth index **decreases** by (Xi‚ąíj)‚čÖ(Xi‚ąíj+1)(X_i - j)\cdot (X_i - j + 1)(Xi‚Äč‚ąíj)‚čÖ(Xi‚Äč‚ąíj+1).
For indices kkk, (Xi<k‚Č§min(N,Xi+Yi))(X_i \lt k \le \texttt{min} (N, X_i + Y_i))(Xi‚Äč<k‚Č§min(N,Xi‚Äč+Yi‚Äč)), the value at the kthk^{th}kth index **increases** by (k‚ąíXi)‚čÖ(k‚ąíXi+1)(k-X_i)\cdot (k - X_i + 1)(k‚ąíXi‚Äč)‚čÖ(k‚ąíXi‚Äč+1).
The value at the Xith{X_i}^{th}Xi‚Äčth index remains as it is.
Find the resultant array after all bombs blast.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers N,MN, MN,M - the size of the array and the total number of bomb blasts, respectively.
The next MMM lines of each test case contains two space-separated integers Xi,YiX_i, Y_iXi‚Äč,Yi‚Äč - index at which the bomb will blast and the range of the bomb, respectively.




Output Format
For each test case, print NNN space-separated integers, denoting the resultant array after all bombs blast.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 2‚čÖ1052\cdot 10^{5}2‚čÖ105.
The sum of MMM over all test cases won't exceed 2‚čÖ1052\cdot 10^{5}2‚čÖ105.
